points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray2",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray2",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray2",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.6),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.4), y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.6),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.4),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray2",cex=0.4)

# points(log(as.numeric(dfcomb$V2)),abs(as.numeric(dfcomb$Z))^alpha_val)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfcomb2$V2)),abs(as.numeric(dfcomb2$Z))^alpha_val,col=2,pch=20)
abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)




plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L32 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL32$V1)),log(dfL32$Z),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
#lines(log(as.numeric(dfL32$V1[dfL32$inc==1])),log(dfL32$Z[dfL32$inc==1]),col="black",pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL$V1)),log(dfL32_LLL$Z),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=8,cex=0.2)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_2decplace$V1)),log(dfL32_LLL_2decplace$Z),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_3xapprox$V1)),log(dfL32_LLL_3xapprox$Z),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
#points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfL32_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L32 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*3/2) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*3)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*3)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*3/2) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL32$V2)),log(dfL32$Z*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
#lines(log(as.numeric(dfL32$V2[dfL32$inc==1])),log(dfL32$Z[dfL32$inc==1]*3/2),col="black",pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL$V2)),log(dfL32_LLL$Z*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=8,cex=0.2)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_2decplace$V2)),log(dfL32_LLL_2decplace$Z*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_3xapprox$V2)),log(dfL32_LLL_3xapprox$Z*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
#points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfL32_LLL_approx$Z*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L32 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*3/2) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*3)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*3)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*3/2) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)


points((log(as.numeric(dfL32$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log((dfL32$Z)*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
#lines((log(as.numeric(dfL32$V2[dfL32$inc==1]))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log((dfL32$Z[dfL32$inc==1])*3/2),col="black",pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log((dfL32_LLL$Z)*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=8,cex=0.2)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_2decplace$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log((dfL32_LLL_2decplace$Z)*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_3xapprox$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL32_LLL_3xapprox$Z*3/2),col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
#points(log(as.numeric(dfL32_LLL_approx$V2)),((dfL32_LLL_approx$Z)*3/2)^alpha_val,col=rgb(1,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L43 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL43$V1)),log(dfL43$Z),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL$V1)),log(dfL43_LLL$Z),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL_4xapprox$V1)),log(dfL43_LLL_4xapprox$Z),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
#points(log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfL43_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L43 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*4/2) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*4)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*4)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*4/2) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL43$V2)),log(dfL43$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL$V2)),log(dfL43_LLL$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL_4xapprox$V2)),log(dfL43_LLL_4xapprox$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
#points(log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfL43_LLL_approx$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L43 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*4/2) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*4)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*4)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*4/2) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)


points((log(as.numeric(dfL43$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL43$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL43_LLL$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL43_LLL_4xapprox$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL43_LLL_4xapprox$Z*4/2),col=rgb(0,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)




```
\elandscape

\clearpage

\blandscape
```{r different_rescalings_pt2, echo=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, fig.show = "hold",  out.width = c("32%","32%","32%"), fig.align = "center", fig.cap="A graphical comparison for each investigated 1st degree L-function or Davenport-Heilbronn function of \\textbf{left column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log(t)$, \\textbf{middle column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)$, \\textbf{right column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\frac{\\left(\\sqrt{\\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)}-1\\right)}{0.5}$ for top row - $L(\\chi_5(4,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$, middle row - $L(\\chi_5(3,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$ and bottom row - $L(\\chi_5(2,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$", fig.height=5}

plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L54 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL54$V1)),log(dfL54$Z),col=rgb(1,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL54_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfL54_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(1,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L54 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/4) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/4) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL54$V2)),log(dfL54$Z*5/4),col=rgb(1,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL54_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfL54_LLL_approx$Z*5/4),col=rgb(1,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L54 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/4) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/4) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)

points((log(as.numeric(dfL54$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL54$Z*5/4),col=rgb(1,0,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL54_LLL_approx$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL54_LLL_approx$Z*5/4),col=rgb(1,0,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L53 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL53$V1)),log(dfL53$Z),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL$V1)),log(dfL53_LLL$Z),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_2decplace$V1)),log(dfL53_LLL_2decplace$Z),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfL53_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_5xapprox$V1)),log(dfL53_LLL_5xapprox$Z),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L53 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/3) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/4) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL53$V2)),log(dfL53$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL$V2)),log(dfL53_LLL$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_2decplace$V2)),log(dfL53_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfL53_LLL_approx$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_5xapprox$V2)),log(dfL53_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L53 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/4) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/4) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)

points((log(as.numeric(dfL53$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL53$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL53_LLL$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_2decplace$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL53_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL53_LLL_5xapprox$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL53_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.5,0.2,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L52 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL52$V1)),log(dfL52$Z),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL$V1)),log(dfL52_LLL$Z),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_2decplace$V1)),log(dfL52_LLL_2decplace$Z),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfL52_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_5xapprox$V1)),log(dfL52_LLL_5xapprox$Z),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L52 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/4) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/4) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL52$V2)),log(dfL52$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL$V2)),log(dfL52_LLL$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_2decplace$V2)),log(dfL52_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfL52_LLL_approx$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_5xapprox$V2)),log(dfL52_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L52 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/4) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/4) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)

points((log(as.numeric(dfL52$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL52$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL52_LLL$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_2decplace$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL52_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL52_LLL_5xapprox$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL52_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/4),col=rgb(0.2,0.5,1,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)




```
\elandscape

\clearpage

\blandscape
```{r different_rescalings_pt3, echo=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, fig.show = "hold",  out.width = c("32%","32%","32%"), fig.align = "center", fig.cap="A graphical comparison for each investigated 1st degree L-function or Davenport-Heilbronn function of \\textbf{left column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log(t)$, \\textbf{middle column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)$, \\textbf{right column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\frac{\\left(\\sqrt{\\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)}-1\\right)}{0.5}$ for top row - $L(\\chi_7(6,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$, middle row - $L(\\chi_{37}(36,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$ and bottom row - $L(\\chi_{51}(50,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$", fig.height=5}

plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L76 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL76$V1)),log(dfL76$Z),col=rgb(0.5,1,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L76 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*7/6) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*7/6) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL76$V2)),log(dfL76$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,1,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L76 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*7/6) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*7/6) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)

points((log(as.numeric(dfL76$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL76$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,1,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)




plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L37p36 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL37p36$V1)),log(dfL37p36$Z),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL37p36_LLL$V1)),log(dfL37p36_LLL$Z),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=8,cex=0.2)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL37p36_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfL37p36_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L37p36 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*37/36) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*37)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*37)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*37/36) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL37p36$V2)),log(dfL37p36$Z*37/36),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL37p36_LLL$V2)),log(dfL37p36_LLL$Z*37/36),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=8,cex=0.2)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL37p36_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfL37p36_LLL_approx$Z*37/36),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L37p36 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*37/36) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*37)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*37)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*37/36) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)


points((log(as.numeric(dfL37p36$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL37p36$Z*37/36),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL37p36_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL37p36_LLL$Z*37/36),col=rgb(1,0.498,0.314,0.5),pch=8,cex=0.2)



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L51p50 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL51p50$V1)),log(dfL51p50$Z),col=rgb(1,0.843,0.,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L51p50 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*51/32) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*51)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*51)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*51/32) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL51p50$V2)),log(dfL51p50$Z*51/32),col=rgb(1,0.843,0.,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L51p50 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*51/32) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*51)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*51)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*51/32) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)


points((log(as.numeric(dfL51p50$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL51p50$Z*51/32),col=rgb(1,0.843,0.,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)


 


```
\elandscape

\clearpage


\blandscape
```{r different_rescalings_pt4, echo=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, fig.show = "hold",  out.width = c("32%","32%","32%"), fig.align = "center", fig.cap="A graphical comparison for each 1st degree investigated 1st degree L-function or Davenport-Heilbronn function of \\textbf{left column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log(t)$, \\textbf{middle column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)$, \\textbf{right column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\frac{\\left(\\sqrt{\\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)}-1\\right)}{0.5}$ for top row - $f_2(0.5+I\\cdot t)$ and bottom row - $f_1(0.5+I\\cdot t)$.", fig.height=7}

plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest $f_2$ |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2$V1)),log(dfDHf2$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL$V1)),log(dfDHf2_LLL$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_2decplace$V1)),log(dfDHf2_LLL_2decplace$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfDHf2_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_5xapprox$V1)),log(dfDHf2_LLL_5xapprox$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest $f_2$ |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/9.04) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/9.04) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2$V2)),log(dfDHf2$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL$V2)),log(dfDHf2_LLL$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_2decplace$V2)),log(dfDHf2_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfDHf2_LLL_approx$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_5xapprox$V2)),log(dfDHf2_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest $f_2$ |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/9.04) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/9.04) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)



points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf2$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf2_LLL$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_2decplace$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf2_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_approx$V2)),(dfDHf2_LLL_approx$Z*5/9.04)^alpha_val,col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf2_LLL_5xapprox$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf2_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/9.04),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest $f_1$ |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1$V1)),log(dfDHf1$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL$V1)),log(dfDHf1_LLL$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_2decplace$V1)),log(dfDHf1_LLL_2decplace$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_approx$V1)),log(dfDHf1_LLL_approx$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_5xapprox$V1)),log(dfDHf1_LLL_5xapprox$Z),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest DHf1 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/2.568) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/2.568) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1$V2)),log(dfDHf1$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL$V2)),log(dfDHf1_LLL$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_2decplace$V2)),log(dfDHf1_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
# points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_approx$V2)),log(dfDHf1_LLL_approx$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_5xapprox$V2)),log(dfDHf1_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest DHf1 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*5/2.568) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*5)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*5/2.568) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf1$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf1$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf1_LLL$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_2decplace$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf1_LLL_2decplace$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfDHf1_LLL_5xapprox$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfDHf1_LLL_5xapprox$Z*5/2.568),col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5),pch=6,cex=0.3)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)



```
\elandscape

\clearpage

\blandscape
```{r different_rescalings_pt5, echo=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, fig.show = "hold",  out.width = c("32%","32%","32%"), fig.align = "center", fig.cap="A graphical comparison for each investigated 1st degree L-function or Davenport-Heilbronn function of \\textbf{left column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log(t)$, \\textbf{middle column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)$, \\textbf{right column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\frac{\\left(\\sqrt{\\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)}-1\\right)}{0.5}$ for top row - $L(\\chi_7(5,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$ and bottom row - $L(\\chi_7(3,.),0.5+I\\cdot t)$", fig.height=7}



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L75 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL75$V1)),log(dfL75$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL75_LLL$V1)),log(dfL75_LLL$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L75 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*7/6) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*7/6) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL75$V2)),log(dfL75$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL75_LLL$V2)),log(dfL75_LLL$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)



plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L75 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*7/6) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*7/6) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points((log(as.numeric(dfL75$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL75$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL75_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL75_LLL$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.5,0.5,1,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)



plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L73 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL73$V1)),log(dfL73$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.25,0.75,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL73_LLL$V1)),log(dfL73_LLL$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.25,0.75,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)


plot(log(as.numeric(df$V2)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e25)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest L73 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*7/6) vs log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)) plot",xlab="log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)) value",ylab="log(|Z|*7/6) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V2)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi)),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points(log(as.numeric(di$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2)),log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(dfL73$V2)),log(dfL73$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.25,0.75,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(dfL73_LLL$V2)),log(dfL73_LLL$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.25,0.75,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)

lines(seq(.1,50,by=.1),1.274014+0.866363*(seq(.1,50,by=.1)^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col="brown",lty=6)


plot((log(as.numeric(df$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=log(c(1,1e5)),ylim=c(-1,15),
     main="growth of largest L73 |Z| peaks \n log(|Z|*7/6) vs (sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)))-1)/0.5 plot",xlab="(sqrt(log(sqrt((t/2/pi)^1*7)))-1)/0.5 value",ylab="log(|Z|*7/6) value");grid(col="gray2")
points((log(as.numeric(df2$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dft$t)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points((log(sqrt(dfr$t/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(sqrt(as.numeric(dgr$V1)/2/pi))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points((log(as.numeric(dhr$Q1))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points((log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(di$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)

points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),pch=6,cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))),x1=(log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
points((log(as.numeric(dilowerT$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(abs(as.numeric(dilowerT$V5))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)


points((log(as.numeric(dfL73$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL73$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.25,0.75,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)
points((log(as.numeric(dfL73_LLL$V2))^alpha_val-1)/alpha_val,log(dfL73_LLL$Z*7/6),col=rgb(0.25,0.75,0.5,0.5),pch=20,cex=0.5)

abline(a=1.274014,b=.866363,col="brown",lty=6)



```
\elandscape

\clearpage

\blandscape
```{r different_rescalings_pt6, echo=FALSE, warnings=FALSE, fig.show = "hold",  out.width = c("32%","32%","32%"), fig.align = "center", fig.cap="A graphical comparison for each investigated 1st degree L-function or Davenport-Heilbronn function of \\textbf{left column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log(t)$, \\textbf{middle column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)$, \\textbf{right column} - $\\log\\left(|Z_L|\\cdot \\frac{N_C}{N_{\\chi\\ne0}}\\right) \\text{ vs } \\frac{\\left(\\sqrt{\\log\\left(\\sqrt{(\\frac{t}{2\\pi})^d\\cdot N_C}\\right)}-1\\right)}{0.5}$ for top row - $f_3(0.5+I\\cdot t)$,  and bottom row - $f_4(0.5+I\\cdot t)$", fig.height=7}

plot(log(as.numeric(df$V1)),log(df$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5,
     xlim=c(log(1e0),log(1e40)),ylim=log(c(0.5,100000)),
     main="growth of largest DHf3 |Z| peaks \n standard log(|Z|) vs log(t) plot",xlab="log(t) value",ylab="log(|Z|) value");grid(col="gray2")
points(log(as.numeric(df2$V1)),log(df2$Z),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.5)
points(log(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(df_kotnick_nodup$Z))),pch=6,col="gray2",cex=0.3)
points(log(as.numeric(dft$t)),log(abs(as.numeric(dft$Z))),pch=6,col="gray",cex=0.3)

points(log(dfr$t),log(abs(dfr$Z)),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dgr$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(dgr$V3))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)
points(log(as.numeric(dhr$T)),log(abs(as.numeric(dhr$Z))),pch=20,col="gray",cex=0.4)

points(log(as.numeric(di$V1)),log(abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),pch=6,col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),cex=0.5)
arrows(x0=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),y0=log(0.9*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))),x1=log(as.numeric(di$V1)),col=rgb(0,1,1,0.2),
       y1=log(1.1*abs(as.numeric(di$V4))), length=0.02, angle=90, code=3)
